---
name: "🐛 Bug Report"
about: Report a problem, error, or unexpected behavior
title: "[Bug]: <short description>"
labels: ["bug", "in-progress"]
---

## 🐛 Description
Describe the issue clearly, including what happened and what you expected to happen.

## ⚙️ Environment
| Component | Version |
|------------|----------|
| Spring Boot | x.x.x |
| Java | 17 |
| OS | e.g., Ubuntu 22.04 |
| Environment | dev / staging / prod |

## 🧩 Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Observe error

## 📜 Logs / Stacktrace
```text
<copy logs or stacktrace here>
```
## ✅ Expected Behavior
Explain what the correct behavior should be.

## 🔍 Possible Cause
(Optional) What might have caused the issue (if known).

## 💡 Suggested Fix
(Optional) Ideas or steps to resolve.

## 🧠 Additional Context
Any other details, screenshots, or dependencies.

## 🏷️ Labels
bug, backend, high-priority
